original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: American Diabetes Association Professional Practice Committee for Diabetes
original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: 7. Diabetes Technology: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026
original_registry_entry.jurisdiction: International guideline published by a United States professional organisation
original_registry_entry.population: Children, adolescents and adults with diabetes using or considering glucose-monitoring or insulin-delivery technology, with device- and treatment-specific qualifiers.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Diabetes technology selection, education, monitoring, data review and follow-up.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for selected device-context, patient preference, training, blood-glucose or CGM data review, accuracy concern and skin-reaction documentation. It does not select a device, change therapy or establish UAE device availability.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 7.1–7.5 — general device principles
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting individual circumstances, preferences, caregiver role, device training, data sharing and clinician support needs.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 7.10–7.14 — blood glucose monitoring
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting monitoring method, circumstances, treatment context, suspected inaccuracy, interfering substances and reviewed blood-glucose records.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 7.15–7.20 — continuous glucose monitoring
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting CGM use, individual preference, continuity, periodic use, skin reaction, interfering-substance and reviewed-data context without changing therapy.

title: 7. Diabetes Technology: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026
publisher: American Diabetes Association Professional Practice Committee for Diabetes
jurisdiction: International guideline published by a United States professional organisation
population: Children, adolescents and adults with diabetes using or considering glucose-monitoring or insulin-delivery technology, with device- and treatment-specific qualifiers.
intended_setting: Diabetes technology selection, education, monitoring, data review and follow-up.
access_limitations: Official host returned a challenge or shell page rather than guideline content.
